creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Just an FYI (no need for action on this here, I'm OK with shar), we do recommend these days just uploading a diff even for new ports rather than bothering with shar. The PHB recommends svn-diff[0], but I don't know anyone that would complain if you provide a git-diff instead. =)

[0] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/porting-submitting.html
